task_description: Enhance branch visualization on compare page with uniform headers, all-tests display (including non-run tests with grey icons), and expandable test details with timeline layout

patterns.expand_collapse: Use Set<string> for tracking expanded items, toggle creates new Set to trigger re-render, ChevronRight (collapsed) / ChevronDown (expanded)
patterns.status_icon: StatusIcon component in tree-view.tsx - grey rounded bg-muted for null status, h-3 w-3 sizing, semantic colors (green-500, destructive, yellow-500)
patterns.card_header: CardHeader with pb-3 padding, CardTitle with text-base, need to add min-h-[value] for uniformity

existing_implementations.details: StatusIcon component already handles null status with grey muted icon - can reuse or adapt

data_flow.current: BranchRunInfo only contains results (executed tests), fetched via getLatestRunForBranch -> getTestResultsWithTestInfo
data_flow.required: BranchRunInfo needs to include ALL tests for the repo, with optional status from latest run

key_findings.runs_page_not_branch_view: run-dashboard-client.tsx shows list of recent runs, NOT branch-specific test details. Branch view is only on compare page.
key_findings.grey_icon_pattern_exists: tree-view.tsx default case returns <div className='h-3 w-3 rounded-full bg-muted' /> for null status
key_findings.missing_query: Need a query that returns all tests with their run status (if any) for a specific branch
